description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs go build ./... and a lint job that installs golangci-lint via curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh| sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin and then runs golangci-lint run ./.... In the test stage add a test_job that runs go test -coverprofile=cover.out ./..., then generates a coverage report with go tool cover -func=cover.out > coverage.out and finally tails coverage.out. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
